title: Fire Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:OzaiFirebending.gif|thumb|400px]]

==Summary==
'''Fire manipulation''' is, simply put, the ability to manipulate fire. While the intensity of the ability varies, this tends to be a highly destructive and powerful ability when in the right hands, though it can be hard to control. Naturally, fire can be put out by [[Water Manipulation|water]] easily, and often times, fire manipulators don't come with an immunity to their abilities.

==Users==
* Firebenders ([[Avatar: The Last Airbender]])
* [[Shigekuni Yamamoto Genryusai]] ([[Bleach]])
* [[Natsu Dragneel (X784 to X791)|Natsu Dragneel]] ([[Fairy Tail]])
* [[Sawada Tsunayoshi]] ([[Katekyo Hitman Reborn]])
* [[Human Torch]] ([[Marvel Comics]])
* [[Portgas D. Ace|Ace]] and [[Sakazuki (Admiral Akainu)|Akainu]] ([[One Piece]])
* [[Fujiwara no Mokou]] ([[Touhou Project]])
* [[Hiei]] ([[Yu Yu Hakusho]])
